8.9 Summarize Benchmark Results

Recommended k per algorithm (primary benchmark = max Gower silhouette; smaller k breaks ties)
algorithm k objective bic gower_silhouette ari_vs_anchor_k2 min_cluster_n max_cluster_n lambda lambda_reason
clustMD 2 NA -371835.3 0.339 0.775 1011 8182 NA NA
kamila 2 NA NA 0.303 0.878 1486 7707 NA NA
kproto 2 123298.7 NA 0.322 0.993 1379 7814 3.316 lambdaest (mixed-type set)
